name: Leeuwin Metals Ltd
analysis: LM1's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.2000, stop A$0.1634, target A$0.2300 (0.82:1) — then trail it.
